data.name: PleaseCompleteOrder
data.value: Please complete the current order first

data.name: AdjustGuestCountDescription
data.value: Adjust the number of guests for this order

data.name: ChoiceOrder
data.value: Please select an order to display its items

data.name: ReservationDateTimeRequired
data.value: Reservation date and time are required

data.name: GuestCountAtLeastOne
data.value: Guest count must be at least 1

data.name: ReservationInPast
data.value: Reservation time cannot be in the past

data.name: ReservationFailed
data.value: Failed to create reservation. Table may already be reserved or occupied.

data.name: TableReservationSummary
data.value: Table {0} will be reserved for {1} guests on {2} at {3}

data.name: ConfirmCancelReservation
data.value: Are you sure you want to cancel this reservation?

data.name: NoItemsSelectedToVoid
data.value: No items selected to be voided.

data.name: CannotVoidDispatchedOrder
data.value: Cannot void an order that has already been dispatched.

data.name: ActiveOrderDescription
data.value: This customer has an active order. Choose to edit it or create a new order.

data.name: SearchCustomerFirst
data.value: Please search for a customer first

data.name: Distribution_AssignmentError
data.value: Error occurred while assigning order to driver

data.name: Distribution_VoidOrderConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to void this order? This action cannot be undone.

data.name: Distribution_NoVoidedHistory
data.value: No voided orders found for this day

data.name: ManageCompanyAndBranchesDesc
data.value: Configure your company information and manage all your branches in one place.

data.name: ManageCompanyDesc
data.value: Configure your main company profile and contact information.

data.name: ManageBranchesDesc
data.value: Manage all your branches, addresses, and individual branch settings.

data.name: DeleteBranchConfirm
data.value: Are you sure you want to delete this branch?

data.name: MustPrintBeforeClose
data.value: Must print receipt before closing table

data.name: AllowAddFromCallCenter
data.value: Allow Adding Items from Call Center

data.name: NoAdditionalConstraints
data.value: No additional constraints for this mode

data.name: PleaseCompleteOrVoidAllOrdersBeforeClosing
data.value: Please complete or void all orders before closing the day

data.name: AllOrdersReadyToClose
data.value: All orders are processed. Ready to close the day.

data.name: CloseDayConfirmationMessage
data.value: Are you sure you want to end the business day?

data.name: ThisActionWillResetOrderCountsAndAdvanceDate
data.value: This action will reset order counts and advance the system date.

data.name: SearchByOrderIdOrCashier
data.value: Search by Order ID or Cashier

data.name: ConfirmEntireOrderVoid
data.value: Are you sure you want to void the entire order (including service and tax)?

data.name: SelectAtLeastTwoTablesToMerge
data.value: Please select at least two tables to merge

data.name: ConfirmHospitality
data.value: Do you want to confirm the hospitality order?

data.name: WorkersMealsManagementDesc
data.value: Manage daily meal assignments and usage limits for workers

data.name: StaffMealGroupManagementDesc
data.value: Manage customized groups for workers meals

data.name: SelectYourMealItemsFromPOS
data.value: Select your meal items from POS

data.name: PleaseSelectEmployeeToViewMeal
data.value: Please select employee to view meal

data.name: ScanBadgeOrSearchByName
data.value: Scan badge or search by name
